care.summary: Stunning trailing vine with velvety dark green leaves splashed with silver.
care.water: Water when top 2-3 cm dry; slightly drought-tolerant
care.fertilizer: Liquid feed every 4-6 weeks in growing season
common_issues: Loss of silver variegation in low light
tips: Train on a wall or trellis for display
Propagate in water from node cuttings
